hero.title: Crack NEET, JEE, KEAM Entrance Exams
hero.subtitle: Structured preparation for JEE, NEET, KEAM and other entrance exams with concept-focused teaching and real exam strategies.

preview.title: Concept-Based Learning
preview.description: Comprehensive courses covering Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics/Biology with problem-solving strategies, mock tests, and mentor guidance.

reviews.name: Aditya Nair
reviews.text: The concept explanations are incredibly clear. The physics modules helped me solve advanced problems easily.

reviews.name: Anjali Menon
reviews.text: The biology and chemistry classes are structured perfectly for NEET preparation.

reviews.name: Rahul Joseph
reviews.text: The mock tests and problem-solving sessions made a huge difference in my preparation.
